title.en: Invocation for someone you have spoken ill to

items.arabicText: قَالَ النَّبِيُّ صلى الله عليه وسلم: ((اللَّهُمَّ فَأَيُّمَا مُؤْمِنٍ سَبَبْتُهُ فَاجْعَلْ ذَلِكَ لَهُ قُرْبَةً إِلَيْكَ يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ)).

translations.en: (O Allah, to any believer whom I have insulted, let that be cause to draw him near to You on the Day of Resurrection.)
